   +------+
   |  In  |
   +---+--+
       +--+--++
+[  Outer  ]-oo----------------+
|             |                |
|             |                |
|             |                |
+[  Inner  ]--o--------+       |
|             |        |       |
|             |        |       |
|           --+        |       |
|   +[  Deep  ]----+   |       |
|   |       |      |   |       |
|   |       v      |   |       |
|   |  +--------+  |   |       |
|   |  |  Node  |  |   |       |
|   |  +----+---+  |   |       |
|   |       |      |   |       |
|   |  ++--++      |   |       |
|   +--oo--oo------+   |       |
|      |               |       |
|      |               |       |
|      |               |       |
+------o----o----------+       |
+------o----o------------------+
       v
   +-------+
   |  Out  |
   +-------+
